name: Vivanco Gruppe AG
summary: Vivanco Gruppe AG develops, procures, and supplies equipment and connection accessories for consumer electronics, information technology, and telecommunications industries in Europe. It provides consumer electronics products, including digital wireless products, headphones, speakers, remote controls, microphones, antennas, archiving, digital photo accessories, camcorder accessories, mp3 accessories, cleaning and care products, wall mounting products, and audio and video accessories, as well as audio, video, antennas, and satellite u.TV products. The company also offers information technology products comprising PC-mice, keyboards, PC-audio products, multimedia, PC performance products, notebook accessories, wireless LAN products, PC connections, and tablet accessories. In addition, it provides telecommunication products, such as cellular accessories, mobile lifestyle products, Bluetooth products, and telephone connection products. The company is headquartered in Ahrensburg, Germany. Vivanco Gruppe AG operates as a subsidiary of Xupu Electronics Technology GmbH.
